# Amino acids

## Overview

- Amino acids is a clinical condition or syndrome in biochemistry.

## Epidemiology

- The epidemiology of Amino acids depends on age, sex, geography, exposure, comorbid disease, medication use, pregnancy status when relevant, and ascertainment setting.

## Risk Factors

- For Amino acids, risk factors should guide pretest probability and prevention, not replace objective assessment.

## Management

- Assess stability first, then treat the underlying cause and the complications already present.
